title: Substack Publication and Post Scraper input
description: Extract public Substack publication, author, and post data from publication URLs and direct post URLs. The Actor only collects publicly visible information and does not use login sessions or bypass paywalls.

publicationUrls.title: Publication URLs
publicationUrls.description: One or more public Substack publication URLs. The Actor reads the public publication page and public RSS feed, then opens public post pages for metadata and optional article text.

postUrls.title: Direct post URLs
postUrls.description: Optional direct public Substack post URLs. Use this when you already know the exact posts to extract.

maxPostsPerPublication.title: Max posts per publication
maxPostsPerPublication.description: Maximum number of public posts to collect from each publication feed.

includePostText.title: Include public post text
includePostText.description: When enabled, include the publicly visible article body or public preview text. Paid subscriber-only content is not accessed.

includeExcerpt.title: Include excerpts
includeExcerpt.description: Include public excerpts from RSS feeds or page metadata when available.

includeAuthorInfo.title: Include author info
includeAuthorInfo.description: Include publicly visible author names and author profile URLs when available.

includePublicationInfo.title: Include publication info
includePublicationInfo.description: Include publication name, URL, description, logo, and visible topic/category fields when available.

dateFrom.title: Date from
dateFrom.description: Optional start date filter. Posts published before this date are skipped.

dateTo.title: Date to
dateTo.description: Optional end date filter. Posts published after this date are skipped.

deduplicateResults.title: Deduplicate results
deduplicateResults.description: Remove duplicate posts across publication feeds and direct post URLs using normalized post URLs.

maxConcurrency.title: Maximum concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of public post pages fetched at the same time. Lower this if a publication responds slowly.
maxConcurrency.sectionDescription: The defaults are tuned for moderate, responsible public-page collection.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request timeout
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum seconds to wait for each public Substack page or feed request.

maxRetries.title: Request retries
maxRetries.description: Number of retries for temporary network or HTTP failures.

saveDebugHtml.title: Save debug HTML
saveDebugHtml.description: Save fetched post HTML to the key-value store for troubleshooting. Keep disabled for normal runs.
